name: Bailey's Marbled Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine melted butter, sugar, and cocoa powder in a bowl.
2. Stir in the ground graham cracker crumbs until evenly distributed.
3. Press mixture into the bottom of a greased 9-inch springform pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes, then cool the pan and grease the sides.
5. In another bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth.
6. Gradually beat in sugar, then add eggs one at a time.
7. Blend in Bailey's Irish Cream.
8. Pour about 1/3 of the mixture into a separate bowl and stir in melted chocolate.
9. Pour half of the plain mixture into the prepared pan.
10. Drizzle with half the chocolate mixture.
11. Repeat layers by pouring the remaining batter and chocolate mixture into the pan.
12. Use a knife to gently swirl the batter for a marbled design.
13. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes, then reduce temperature to 250°F and bake for an additional 55 minutes.
